overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077, walking through a neon-lit futuristic city street at night. The scene features wet pavement reflections, towering glass buildings with holographic advertisements, and scattered pedestrians in a dense cyberpunk urban environment.

events.description: passing a pedestrian woman walking in the opposite direction

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk approaching the street intersection

notable_agents.action: woman in business attire walking while talking on a phone

entered.detail: tall futuristic glass skyscraper with illuminated windows
large vertical holographic billboard displaying pink neon text
tall palm tree trunk lining the sidewalk
blue metal safety railing along the sidewalk edge

segments.scene_description: Walking along a concrete sidewalk in a futuristic city at night, passing a woman on her phone. Tall glass towers rise on the left while a massive neon billboard glows in the distance ahead, and palm trees line the right side of the walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: wet city street with reflective pavement

events.description: stepping off the sidewalk onto wet reflective street pavement
white vehicle passes by on the right side of the street

agents.ego_description: walking across the wet street with neon reflections visible on the ground

notable_agents.action: white futuristic car driving down the street from right to left

entered.detail: futuristic cars parked along the right curb

segments.scene_description: Crossing the wet asphalt street where neon lights reflect off the damp pavement. Parked vehicles line the right curb while the camera moves toward the center of the road, with the glass tower and billboard remaining visible ahead.

events.description: transitioning from wet street back onto dry concrete sidewalk
approaching outdoor vendor stalls with illuminated white umbrellas

agents.ego_description: walking along the dry sidewalk approaching the vendor area

entered.detail: food vendor stall with large white umbrella and outdoor seating
building facade with bright pink neon lighting and signage

segments.scene_description: Returning to dry pavement and approaching a commercial area with food vendor stalls on the left. The sidewalk becomes busier with pedestrians walking in the same direction, and a building with vibrant pink neon lighting becomes prominent on the left side.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy commercial strip with outdoor dining

events.description: passing by vendor stalls with people seated at outdoor tables

agents.ego_description: walking past the vendor stalls and outdoor seating areas

notable_agents.action: person in red hoodie walking along the right side of the sidewalk

entered.detail: tables and chairs arranged under the vendor umbrella

segments.scene_description: Walking alongside the vendor stalls with outdoor seating visible on the left. The pink neon-lit building facade dominates the left side while pedestrians walk ahead on the sidewalk, and the distant billboard remains visible straight ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a quiet, palm-lined walkway into a bustling, neon-drenched commercial district. It begins on a concrete sidewalk passing a woman on her phone, with towering glass structures to the left and a massive glowing billboard anchoring the distant horizon. As the camera moves forward, the scene shifts from the walkway to a wet asphalt street where vibrant neon lights reflect off the damp pavement and parked vehicles line the curb. The perspective then returns to dry ground, transitioning into a crowded pedestrian area where the environment opens up to reveal food vendor stalls and a building facade dominated by brilliant pink neon lighting. Finally, the camera glides past outdoor seating and a stream of pedestrians, keeping the distant billboard in sight as the urban density increases.
